name: shadcn-ui-available
description: shadcn/ui is installed with components: button, card, input, label, badge, separator. Uses tailwind v4, radix-ui primitives, class-variance-authority for variants, cn() utility for class merging. lucide-react for icons.
relevantCode: import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'; import { Card } from '@/components/ui/card'
recommendation: Use existing shadcn components for unified page. Can add more shadcn components via 'npx shadcn@latest add [component]' as needed.
